IMPORTANT: gradle-wrapper.jar is NOT included (binary file).

Android Studio will automatically download it when you open the project.
Just open the project in Android Studio and click "OK" on any sync prompts.

If you prefer manual setup, run this in the project root:
  gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.2

Or download from:
  https://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.2-bin.zip
